# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent { label 'master' }

  options {
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    timestamps()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
    skipDefaultCheckout(true)
    preserveStashes(buildCount: 5)
  }

  parameters {
    booleanParam(name: 'DEPLOY_TO_PROD', defaultValue: false, description: 'Deploy to production')
    string(name: 'PROD_ENV', defaultValue: 'production', description: 'Production environment name')
  }

  environment {
    CI = 'true'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
        stash name: 'src', includes: '**/*'
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        unstash 'src'
        sh '''
          set -euxo pipefail
          if [ -f ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew --no-daemon clean assemble
          elif [ -f ./mvnw ]; then
            ./mvnw -B -DskipTests clean package
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B -DskipTests clean package
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No recognized build tool found." >&2
            exit 2
          fi
        '''
      }
      post {
        always {
          archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'build/**/*,target/**/*,dist/**/*', allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      steps {
        unstash 'src'
        sh '''
          set -euxo pipefail
          if [ -f ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew --no-daemon test
          elif [ -f ./mvnw ]; then
            ./mvnw -B test
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B test
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test
          else
            echo "No recognized test command found." >&2
            exit 2
          fi
        '''
      }
      post {
        always {
          junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/build/test-results/test/*.xml,**/target/surefire-reports/*.xml,**/target/failsafe-reports/*.xml'
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when {
        allOf {
          expression { return params.DEPLOY_TO_PROD }
          branch 'main'
        }
      }
      steps {
        unstash 'src'
        input message: "Deploy build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER} to ${params.PROD_ENV}?", ok: 'Deploy'
        sh '''
          set -euxo pipefail
          if [ -x ./deploy.sh ]; then
            ./deploy.sh production
          elif [ -f ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew --no-daemon deploy -Penvironment=production
          elif [ -f ./mvnw ]; then
            ./mvnw -B -Denv=production deploy
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B -Denv=production deploy
          else
            echo "No deployment method found (deploy.sh/Gradle/Maven)." >&2
            exit 2
          fi
        '''
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    success {
      echo "Pipeline completed successfully."
    }
    failure {
      echo "Pipeline failed."
    }
    always {
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
    }
  }
}
